title: The Tale of the Flopsy Bunnies
summaries: "The Tale of the Flopsy Bunnies" by Beatrix Potter is a children's book written and illustrated in 1909. Benjamin Bunny and his cousin Flopsy are now married with six young rabbits. When the hungry Flopsy Bunnies raid Mr. McGregor's rubbish heap for vegetables, they fall asleep and are captured. Their fate rests with a resourceful woodmouse named Thomasina Tittlemouse, who must act before Mr. McGregor carries them away in his sack. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
